name: Crown Reserve Acquisition Corp. I
summary: Overview Crown Reserve Acquisition Corp. I (the Company, Crown Reserve, we, us or our) is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on April 29, 2025. We were formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses (a Business Combination).
